summary: CVX Q1 2026 earnings due May 1. Stock at ~$192.22. Large non-cash downstream timing charges ($2.7B-$3.7B after tax) expected to suppress reported EPS to ~$0.92-$0.97 vs $2.68 prior year. Trump consulted Chevron on Iran oil market turbulence. CVX CEO pushing for Venezuela oil sector reforms.
